notes: Valid funded dense GPTQ base: packed GPTQ5 export on the larger 14-layer dense model with all calibration stats gathered during ordinary late-training batches only.
purpose: Spend packed GPTQ headroom on a materially larger dense model without replaying the completed #549/#589 donor family.
prerequisite: Use the completed local soft-QAT truth run at 1.11956668 as the reference baseline; do not spend more H100 on exact #549/#589 replay lanes.
success_criteria: Beat the completed local #589-style reference baseline at 1.11956668 on final post-export val_bpb while staying under the 16,000,000-byte cap and the 10-minute train/eval limits.
